content: Self-Refine's unstructured iterative self-feedback loop can be grounded and improved by integrating multiple inconsistent solving perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a two-layer self-improvement framework that retains Self-Refine's training-free advantage while fixing its common issue of blind local optimization. This framework lets the LLM first generate multiple divergent candidate solutions from conflicting perspectives, then iteratively refine the best candidate via Self-Refine's self-feedback process.
